forecast-period.text: Cloudy. High chance of showers. Damaging winds possible in the north. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 30 to 40 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south early this evening. Winds westerly 35 to 55 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds southwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the evening. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming west to northwesterly and light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 18.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly in the late morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay later tonight. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h in the late evening.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm later tonight. Winds west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Winds west to southwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Damaging winds possible about the Gammon Ranges. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
